sections.heading: What is CSS Variables & Custom Properties?
sections.body: Reusable values, theming, and dynamic styles with custom properties. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
CSS Variables & Custom Properties is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind CSS Variables & Custom Properties is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use CSS Variables & Custom Properties every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most CSS Variables & Custom Properties implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding CSS Variables & Custom Properties is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
